presets.socialDesc: Suitable for WeChat, Moments sharing (Quality 75%, Width 1280px)
presets.webDesc: Responsive-friendly, balancing mobile and PC (Quality 75%, Width 1080px)
presets.extremeDesc: Minimum size, suitable for batch uploads (Quality 65%, Width 800px)

preview.originalPlaceholder: Original image preview will appear here after upload
preview.resultPlaceholder: Adjust parameters and compress to see the result
preview.originalFailed: Original image failed to load, please retry or change the file
preview.imageFailed: Image failed to load, please try a different file.
preview.failed: Compression preview failed, please adjust parameters and retry
preview.error: An error occurred during compression, please try reducing the size or changing the image.

settings.title: Compression Settings
settings.noCompressTip: If you only want to change the format or resize, you can enable no-compression mode
settings.qualityTip: Lower values mean smaller file size but reduced quality
settings.noCompressOn: "No Compression" mode enabled, original image will be used directly (only effective when size is not adjusted)
settings.transparentPng: Transparent background detected, recommend keeping PNG or switching to WebP
settings.noTransparent: No transparent background detected, recommend switching to JPEG or WebP for smaller size

actions.help1: Supports PNG color quantization compression to effectively reduce PNG file size.
actions.help2: Quality too low will cause obvious distortion. Adjust gradually and compare via the right-side preview.
actions.help3: JPEG is best for photos, WebP balances small size and transparency, PNG is best for graphics requiring transparency.
actions.help4: Compression runs in a separate thread and won't freeze the page (even with large images).

upload.title: Upload Image
upload.watermarkTip: Recommend using a PNG icon or logo with transparent background, not too large.

config.title: Watermark Settings
config.tileGapDesc: Controls horizontal and vertical spacing between watermarks. Larger values mean wider spacing.

urlEncoder.title: URL Encode / Decode
urlEncoder.encodePlaceholder: Enter text or URL to encode...
urlEncoder.guideComponent: encodes all characters except letters, numbers, and
urlEncoder.guideComponentSuffix: . Use it to encode URL parameter values.
urlEncoder.guideUriSuffix: unencoded. Use it to encode a complete URL.
urlEncoder.guideDecode: automatically decodes URL-encoded strings to restore the original text.

textEscaper.guideHtml: escaping is for HTML content to prevent XSS attacks, e.g. `<` → `<`, `>` → `>`.
textEscaper.guideUnicode: encoding converts characters to \uXXXX format, commonly used for non-ASCII characters.
textEscaper.guideJs: escaping handles special characters in JavaScript strings, e.g. `"` → `\"`, newline → `\n`.

colorConverter.invalidLength: Invalid Hex color length, should be 3, 4, 6 or 8 digits

borderRadius.title: Corner Controls
borderRadius.tip: Unlock X/Y axes to independently adjust horizontal and vertical radii for elliptical corners.

streamParser.pasteDesc: Paste SSE (Server-Sent Events) or JSONL (JSON Lines / NDJSON) data. The format will be auto-detected and each record will be parsed as JSON.

cronTranslator.title: Cron Expression Translator

with-seconds.label: With Seconds (6 fields)
with-seconds.desc: sec min hour day month weekday

cronTranslator.detectHint: Current input has {{fields}} fields, possibly {{label}} format
cronTranslator.localTimeNote: All times are in local timezone

userAgentParser.placeholder: Paste a User-Agent string, or click "Use My UA" to auto-fill...
userAgentParser.name: Name

layers.empty: No layers yet. Click "Add Layer" in the top right to get started.

editor.title: Editing: Layer {{index}}
editor.subtitle: Fine-tune the position, size, and color of this layer.

tips.title: Tips
tips.tip1: Use multiple layers to simulate real lighting: one soft large shadow + one small sharp shadow.
tips.tip2: A negative spread radius tightens the shadow edges, preventing them from bleeding over adjacent content.
tips.tip3: In Tailwind, consider extracting the generated shadow-[...] into a component class for consistency.

stops.label: Color Stops
stops.hint: Supports multi-color gradients, sorted by position from left to right.

tips.title: Tips
tips.tip1: For linear gradients, angles between 120° and 160° tend to look softer and more natural.
tips.tip2: Keep at least two color stops; more stops create richer gradient layers.
tips.tip3: Tailwind arbitrary value syntax is great for quick experiments; extract frequently used gradients into custom class names for reuse.

scrollBar.previewText: This is the scrollbar preview area. Scroll up and down (or left and right if horizontal is enabled) to see the style effect.
scrollBar.previewRow: Row {{count}}: Scrollbar visual config demo — adjust the parameters on the left to observe changes in width, color, border-radius, and border.
scrollBar.tip1: The generated CSS uses the selector .scrollbar-code-area by default. You can change it to your own class name.
scrollBar.tip2: If you only want the scrollbar to appear on hover, check "Show on hover only".
scrollBar.tip3: The horizontal scroll toggle only affects the preview content width, so you can preview horizontal scrollbar styles at the same time.

jsonFormatter.noEscapesFound: No escape sequences found to remove
jsonFormatter.repositoryDesc: Manage JSON data saved in local IndexedDB
jsonFormatter.saveTooltip: Data will be stored in your browser's local IndexedDB
jsonFormatter.saveDialogDesc: Will be saved in your browser's local database (IndexedDB)

base64.placeholderEncodeInput: Enter text to encode here. Supports multi-line and Unicode.
base64.placeholderDecodeInput: Paste the Base64 string to decode here. Line breaks are allowed.
base64.hintEncode: Type any text and the Base64 result will be generated in real time.
base64.hintDecode: Paste a Base64 string and the original text will be restored on the right.
base64.tipBase64Chars: Tip: Base64 should only contain letters, digits, +, / and up to two = padding characters.
base64.errorLengthMultiple: Base64 string length must be a multiple of 4
base64.errorInvalidBase64: The content does not appear to be a valid Base64 string
base64.errorDecodeFailed: Base64 decoding failed. Please check that the content is complete.
base64.placeholderEncodeOutput: The encoded Base64 string will appear here in real time.
base64.placeholderDecodeOutput: The decoded text will appear here.
base64.labelSelectImage: Select or drop an image file
base64.uploaderTitle: Drop an image here, or click to select a file
base64.uploaderHint: Supports common image formats (PNG / JPG / JPEG / GIF, etc.). Max 8 MB per image.
base64.toastFileTooLarge: Image is too large. Please select a file under 8 MB.
base64.toastReadFailed: Failed to read image. Please try again or choose a different file.
base64.usageTip1: All encoding and decoding is done locally in your browser and nothing is uploaded to a server, making it safe for sensitive text or images.
base64.usageTip2: Text mode is useful for generating Authorization headers, config snippets, etc. Note that Base64 output is roughly 33% larger than the original.
base64.usageTip3: Image mode is commonly used to inline small icons or placeholders in CSS, HTML, or JSON. For large images, a URL reference is still recommended.
base64.usageTip4: If decoding fails, check whether the Base64 string contains unexpected line breaks or extra characters, and try removing whitespace before pasting.
base64.usageTip5Pre: A Data URL typically looks like:
base64.usageTip5Post: — you can paste the entire string directly into your stylesheet or tag attribute.
base64.dialogPlaceholder: Paste a data:image/... or raw Base64 string here, e.g. copied from a network request or config file.
base64.dialogHint: Supports a full Data URL (with data:image/...;base64, prefix) or a raw Base64 string. Line breaks and whitespace are ignored automatically.
base64.dialogLocalOnly: All parsing is done locally and nothing is uploaded to a server.
base64.dialogErrorEmpty: Please enter an image Base64 or Data URL to parse
base64.dialogErrorInvalid: The content does not appear to be a valid image Base64

asciiArt.hintAsciiOnly: Note: figlet fonts only support ASCII characters. Chinese characters will not render.
asciiArt.errorFontLoad: Font failed to load. Please try a different font.
asciiArt.emptyHint: Enter text above to start generating

upload.hint: Drag and drop a file here, or click to select
upload.sizeLimit: Supports common text/code files. Max 2MB per file.

placeholder.left: Paste original text here, e.g. old version code or config
placeholder.right: Paste target text here, e.g. new version code or config

clearDialog.title: Clear all text?
clearDialog.description: This will clear all text on both sides along with the diff result. This action cannot be undone.

toast.inputRequired: Please enter text or upload a file on either side first

result.title: Diff Result
result.computing: Computing diff, please wait for large texts…

empty.hint: Waiting for diff result. Enter text above and click "Compare Now".
empty.privacy: All computation is done locally in your browser. No text is uploaded. Great for diffing configs, API responses, or code snippets.

timestampConverter.datetimeHint: Supports ISO 8601, yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss, yyyy/MM/dd and other common formats. Output is normalized.

error.datetimeParseFailed: Failed to parse the datetime format

table.excelParseFailed: Failed to parse Excel file, please check the file format

placeholder.tsInput: Paste TypeScript interface or type here...

usage.title: Usage
usage.schemaToTs: : Converts JSON Schema to TypeScript interface or type, supporting nested objects, arrays, enums, union types, and more.
usage.tsToSchema: : Converts TypeScript interface/type to JSON Schema, supporting Draft-04 and Draft-07.
usage.swapDesc: : Uses the output as new input for bidirectional validation.
usage.supportedTypes: Supported types: primitives, arrays, nested objects, union types (|), intersection types (&), enums, $ref references, and more.

explanation.empty: Enter a regex to see its explanation

match.empty: Enter test text to see match results

username.name: Username
username.description: Starts with letter, 3-16 alphanumeric or underscore chars

g.label: Global
g.description: Find all matches, not just the first one

m.label: Multiline
m.description: ^ and $ match start/end of each line

diagram.empty: Enter a regex to see its visualization

meta.zeroOrMore: Matches the preceding element zero or more times
meta.oneOrMore: Matches the preceding element one or more times
meta.zeroOrOne: Matches the preceding element zero or one time
meta.or: OR operator, matches left or right

qrcodeTool.previewPlaceholder: Enter content to generate QR code
qrcodeTool.errorLevelAutoH: Auto H level when Logo is set
qrcodeTool.logoHint: Logo will be placed at the center of the QR code. A square image with transparent background is recommended.
qrcodeTool.placeholderText: Enter text, URL or any content...
qrcodeTool.locationHint: Tip: You can get coordinates from a map application.
qrcodeTool.parseUploadHint: Click or drag image here to upload
qrcodeTool.parseUploadFormats: Supports JPG, PNG, GIF and other common image formats
qrcodeTool.parseErrorNotRecognized: Unable to recognize QR code. Please ensure the image is clear and contains a valid QR code.
qrcodeTool.parseErrorModuleLoad: QR code parsing module failed to load
qrcodeTool.usageText: Enter any text or URL to generate a corresponding QR code.
qrcodeTool.usageWifi: Fill in the network name, password, and encryption type. Scan to connect to WiFi instantly.
qrcodeTool.usageContact: Generates a vCard-format QR code. Scan to add contact directly.
qrcodeTool.usageSms: Fill in the recipient and message. Scan to send SMS quickly.
qrcodeTool.usageLocation: Enter latitude and longitude. Scan to open the location in a map app.
qrcodeTool.usageStyle: Customize QR code color, size, and margin. You can also upload a brand logo to place at the center.

wordCount.findReplaceTooltip: This is a lightweight text processing tool that does not support find highlighting. If needed, use the browser built-in find function (Ctrl/Cmd + F).
wordCount.confirmClear: Are you sure you want to clear the content?
wordCount.toastNoMatch: No match found or content unchanged

errors.emptyFile: File is empty or failed to read

canonical.sugg: Strongly recommended to add a self-referential canonical tag to prevent duplicate content issues

robots.sugg: Confirm this is intentional; otherwise search engines will ignore this page

keywords.desc: Keywords set (ignored by major search engines)

og.sugg: Add og:title, og:description, og:image to improve social sharing

twitter.name: Twitter Card
twitter.sugg: Add twitter:card and related tags to improve Twitter sharing

h1.name: H1 Tag
h1.sugg: Add one H1 tag describing the main content of the page

heading-hierarchy.name: Heading Hierarchy
heading-hierarchy.sugg: Keep heading levels sequential, avoid skipping levels

img-alt.name: Image Alt Attribute
img-alt.sugg: Alt attributes are critical for accessibility and image SEO

img-dimensions.name: Image Dimensions
img-dimensions.sugg: Specifying width and height reduces CLS (Cumulative Layout Shift)

link-security.name: External Link Security
link-security.sugg: Add rel=noopener noreferrer to external links for security

structured-data.name: Structured Data
structured-data.sugg: Adding JSON-LD structured data helps achieve rich search results

doctype.sugg: Add DOCTYPE html as the first line of your HTML

html-lang.sugg: Add a lang attribute to the html tag to declare the page language

semantic.sugg: Use header, nav, main, footer etc. appropriately to improve SEO

content-length.name: Word Count
content-length.sugg: The page may rely on JS rendering; search engines may not crawl the body text

panels.noBaseUrl: Local HTML / code mode has no source URL; relative path images/links cannot be previewed or followed.

headings.empty: No heading tags on this page

uploader.title: Drag SVG files here, or
uploader.hint: Supports batch uploading multiple SVG files

params.bgColorJpeg: Background Color (JPEG does not support transparency)
params.individualModeHint: Individual mode: click a file in the list to edit its params separately

guide.title: Usage Notes
guide.tip1: Supports batch uploading multiple SVG files; unified params apply to all files by default.
guide.tip2: Click Individual Params to set conversion params for each file separately.
guide.tip3: Click a file in the list to switch the preview target.
guide.tip4: PNG supports transparent backgrounds, ideal for icons and graphics with transparency.
guide.tip5: JPEG has the smallest file size but does not support transparency; best for photos.
guide.tip6: WebP balances small size and transparency support with good browser compatibility.
guide.tip7: Complex SVGs (external fonts, filters, animations) may not export well; simplify before converting.
